# nomad_acl_token (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_acl_token" "dakota" {
  name     = "Dakota"
  type     = "client"
  policies = ["dev", "qa"]
}

resource "nomad_acl_token" "dakota" {
  name     = "Dakota"
  type     = "client"
  policies = ["dev", "qa"]
  global   = true
}

resource "nomad_acl_token" "iman" {
  name = "Iman"
  type = "management"
}

resource "nomad_acl_token" "token" {
  type     = "client"
  policies = ["dev"]
}

output "nomad_token" {
  value = nomad_acl_token.token.secret_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) The type of token to create, 'client' or 'management'.

### Optional

- `expiration_ttl` (String) Provides a TTL for the token in the form of a time duration such as "5m" or "1h".
- `global` (Boolean) Whether the token should be replicated to all regions or not.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name for this token.
- `policies` (Set of String) The ACL policies to associate with the token, if it's a 'client' type.
- `role` (Block Set) The roles that should be applied to the token. It may be used multiple times. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--role))

### Read-Only

- `accessor_id` (String) Nomad-generated ID for this token.
- `create_time` (String) The timestamp the token was created.
- `expiration_time` (String) The point after which a token is considered expired and eligible for destruction.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `secret_id` (String, Sensitive, Deprecated) The value that grants access to Nomad.

<a id="nestedblock--role"></a>
### Nested Schema for `role`

Required:

- `id` (String) The ID of the ACL role to link.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the ACL role linked.
